tags.name: fab-menu-item
tags.description:
An action item within a `fab-menu`.

Attributes:

  * `label` {`string`} - The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

  * `icon` {`"" | "function" | "settings" | "dark_mode" | "light_mode" | "routine" | "123" | "360" | "10k" | "10mp" | "11mp" | "12mp" | "13mp" | "14mp" | "15mp" | "16mp" | "17mp" | "18_up_rating" | ... 3822 more ... | "zoom_out_map"`} - The icon to display inside the FAB item.

Properties:

  * `styles` {`any[]`} - 

  * `_fab` {`MdFab`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - The text label displayed next to the FAB item.
